rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (Da'an, Xinyi, Zhongzheng); Da'an ~NT$18,000-28,000 ($560-870); center avg $828 reported; notably cheaper than other cities in batch

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; electricity $120/mo (AC heavy in summer); internet NT$840/mo (~$28)

groceries.note: home cooking; PX Mart/Carrefour/markets; Taiwan groceries very affordable; NT$5,000-7,000/mo

diningOut.note: eating out 80% of time ~$250-500; night market meals NT$60-150 (~$2-5); very affordable dining

transit.note: TPASS monthly NT$1,200 (~$38) unlimited MRT + bus; one of cheapest transit systems in this batch

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; FutureWard from NT$3,950 (~$123); market range $100-180/mo

simData.note: SIM-only plan (Chunghwa Telecom/Taiwan Mobile); unlimited data NT$499/mo (~$16); excellent 5G coverage

misc.note: gym (~NT$1,200), toiletries, entertainment, night market outings, cultural activities, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Taipei medium-term furnished lets are stable year-round.

evidence.quote: digital nomads should plan for approximately $2,045/month in Taipei, covering coworking, accommodation, food, and local transport; A comfortable monthly budget in Taipei is approximately $1,456, including city centre rent ($828)

evidence.claim: Taipei furnished studio rent by neighborhood
evidence.quote: Furnished studios range from $500-900 in most neighborhoods, with Da'an (central, social) running $600-900 and Nangang (up-and-coming) dropping to $450-650
The TPASS monthly pass costs NT$1,200 (~$38) for unlimited MRT + bus access in Taipei
Coworking spaces cost $100-180/month, with FutureWard starting at NT$3,950
